queries_analyzed: Last 24 hours of query history from ACCOUNT_USAGE.QUERY_HISTORY

recommended_materialized_views.name: MV_INCIDENT_SUMMARY_24H
recommended_materialized_views.description: Last 24h incident summary (count, avg latency, by server)

recommended_materialized_views.name: MV_TOP_10_SERVERS_30D
recommended_materialized_views.description: Last 30d top 10 servers by incident count

recommended_materialized_views.name: MV_PIPELINE_HEALTH
recommended_materialized_views.description: Pipeline health (placeholder for Kafka lag, validation status, dbt health)
recommended_materialized_views.note: Requires integration with external monitoring tables

recommended_clustering_changes.action: ALTER TABLE FCT_INCIDENTS_V1 CLUSTER BY (DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', TIMESTAMP), SERVER_ID, SEVERITY, EVENT_TYPE)
ALTER TABLE FCT_METRICS_V1 CLUSTER BY (SERVER_ID, DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', TIMESTAMP))

notes: The clustering keys are chosen based on common query patterns: filtering by time ranges and grouping by server_id, severity, and event_type.
Materialized views are automatically maintained by Snowflake and will refresh as the underlying data changes.
For the pipeline health view, consider creating a table that is populated by a separate process that collects metrics from Kafka, validation logs, and dbt run history.
